description_long: This is a single slice of cake with a light green sponge interior and a layer of cream or frosting in the middle. The exterior is coated in a thick, white icing with subtle pinkish-purple swirls and decorative elements on the top, possibly rose petals or similar edible decorations. The cake appears moist and fluffy, with a soft, airy texture visible in the sponge. The top surface is slightly uneven, with visible swirls and peaks in the icing, adding a rustic, homemade charm. The slice is cut cleanly, revealing the distinct layers and the contrast between the green sponge and the creamy filling. No candles or additional objects are present, and the cake is not displayed on any visible container or plate.
description: A slice of green sponge cake with a creamy middle layer, coated in white icing with pinkish swirls and floral decorations on top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the pointed tip of the cake slice, highlighting the green sponge and the thick white icing with decorative toppings.
description_view_1: This side view displays the full profile of the cake, clearly showing the two green sponge layers separated by a creamy filling and the smooth white icing exterior.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the flat, iced surface with pinkish swirls and some decorative elements, but no visible sponge layers.
description_view_3: Another side view similar to view 1, showing the green sponge, creamy middle, and white icing, with a focus on the decorative top edge.
